evals.prompt: Develop a seasonal home decor makeover video.
expect: returns hook, title options, outline, thumbnail concept, and SEO description
includes at least 3 standalone short-form clips
each clip has its own first-3-seconds hook
title front-loads the primary keyword and aligns with the thumbnail

evals.prompt: Give me the Shorts from this closet makeover video.
expect: no clip references earlier in the video
each clip works with no prior context

evals.prompt: Title and thumbnail for a budget thrifted lamp restoration.
expect: title and thumbnail align and do not overpromise
no fabricated view or performance claims
